A women's discipleship community where faith meets real life. You belong here.

Join Our Community
Scroll ↓
Our Story

More Than a Bible Study

Christ and Coffee was born from a simple idea — that women grow deeper in faith when they do life together. What started as a small WhatsApp chat has grown into a thriving women's discipleship community.

We are inter-church, inter-denominational, and wide open. Whether you've walked with God for decades or you're just finding your footing — there is a seat at this table for you.

"Iron sharpens iron, and one person sharpens another." — Proverbs 27:17

Based in Connecticut — but building a community beyond borders.

What We Offer

Our Programs

Bible Study Series

Deep dive discussions into the Word of God. We study women of the Bible, books of scripture, and real life application — all in a safe, honest, and welcoming space. Meetings twice monthly.

View Current Series →
🌿

Temple Wellness

A 6-week faith based wellness program covering physical health, mental health, and nutrition. Because stewarding our bodies is an act of worship. — 1 Corinthians 6:19

Learn More →
🎙️

The Conversations

Deeper conversations about faith, life, discipleship and everything in between. Our podcast is coming soon and trust us — you don't want to miss it.

Stay Tuned →

What We Stand For

Our Core Values

Biblical Truth

Everything we do is rooted in the Word of God. We study it, live it, and grow through it together.

Authenticity

No masks. No performance. Just real women having real conversations about real life and faith.

Community

We believe women grow deeper when they do life together. You were never meant to walk this journey alone.

🌱

Growth

We celebrate progress over perfection. Every woman here is a work in progress — and that's exactly the point.

Getting Started

How It Works

1

Join the Community

Fill out our member sign up form to get connected. We'll make sure you never miss an event, study, or birthday shoutout!

2

Show Up

Come to a Christ and Coffee meetup! We gather twice a month for deep discussion, real talk, and good coffee. No perfect faith required.

3

Go Deeper

Get involved in our programs — Temple Wellness, Bible Study Series, special events and more. There's always a place for you.

4

Invite Someone

Know a woman who needs community? Bring her! Christ and Coffee grows one invitation at a time. Every woman belongs here.

Community Love

Real Women. Real Faith. Real Community.

"

Christ and Coffee has given me a safe place to be honest about my faith journey. I've never felt judged — only loved and encouraged to keep growing.

— C&C Member

"

I came not knowing anyone and left feeling like I'd found my people. The discussions are real, the women are genuine, and the coffee is always good!

— C&C Member

"

Temple Wellness changed how I see my body. I finally understand that taking care of myself IS an act of worship. This community is truly life-changing.

— Temple Wellness Participant

Sow Into C ✝ C Ministry

Christ and Coffee has always been free and always will be. But if God puts it on your heart to help us grow and reach more women — we'd be so grateful.

Support C✝C

Get In Touch

We'd Love to Hear From You

Whether you have a question, want to get involved, or just want to say hi — our door is always open.
